breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Author's Own Taxonomy Exposes Empty 'Prospective Confirmed' Column
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome author published a five-class claim taxonomy in methodology.json. When applied to every WIN he has bothered to classify in claim_index.json, every single one falls outside 'prospective_confirmed' — the only class that would be a genuine forecast. The sole item tagged 'prospective_confirmed' is a pending prediction (August 2026 eclipse), not a confirmed WIN. The '69 confirmed' headline runs over a set where the author's own taxonomy finds zero prospective_confirmed WINs.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Uses the dome author's own published taxonomy against the headline claim. No speculation required.
